html:
Exclusive to:

Moon Rocks are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They are obtained by mining crash-landed Meteors, which have the appearance of sharp rocks striped with jagged blue cracks, or Suspicious Moonrock sculptures. Mining a Meteor Boulder will yield a Rock, a Flint, and 2 Moon Rocks. There is a 60% chance for a third, and a 30% chance for a fourth Moon Rock.

Moon Rocks can be crafted into Moon Rock Walls, Cratered Moonrocks, Moon Dials, Moon Rock Idols and Moon Crater Turf. They are also required to repair the Moon Stone, and to complete construction on upgrading the Florid Postern to the Celestial Portal.

Moon Rock can also be crafted by Wilson with 2 Marble after unlocking the "Transmute Ore III" skill.

Trivia

Old Moon Rock icon.
  • Moon Rocks are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch in the ...In with the New update.
  • In the A Little Fixer Upper update, the textures for Moon Rocks and all related items were updated.
  • Even though Moon Rocks are not available in the singleplayer game, Characters introduced with the Hamlet DLC have unused examination quotes for them.

Gallery

  • Several Moon Rocks next to a Meteor Boulder.
  • Old Moon Rock texture items beside some Moon Rock Walls.
  • An early texture for the Moon Rock as shown in the "...In With The New" update trailer.

“That rock came from the moon.”
–Wilson
“Just another rock to me.”
–Willow
“But is not cheese?”
–Wolfgang
“It's traveled so far...”
–Wendy
“A ROCK. FROM THE MOON”
–WX-78

–Woodie

–Wortox

–Walter
“I never would have predicted I'd see a piece of the moon up close.”
–Wanda

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Old Moon Rock icon.
Moon Rocks are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch in the ...In with the New update.
In the A Little Fixer Upper update, the textures for Moon Rocks and all related items were updated.
Even though Moon Rocks are not available in the singleplayer game, Characters introduced with the Hamlet DLC have unused examination quotes for them.
“Evidentaly, useful minerals can be extracted from it.”
–Wagstaff
“'TIS ROCK O' MOON BITS"”
–Wilba
“Fascinating! These are nothing like the meteorites I've seen.”
–Wagstaff
“A ROCK O' YON MOON”
–Wilba

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đá Mặt Trăng là Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Chúng có được bằng cách khai thác các Thiên thạch rơi xuống đất, có bề ngoài là những tảng đá sắc nhọn có sọc xanh lởm chởm hoặc các tác phẩm điêu khắc Moonrock đáng ngờ. Khai thác Đá Tảng Sao Băng sẽ thu được Đá, Đá Lửa và 2 Đá Mặt Trăng. Có 60% cơ hội có được Đá Mặt Trăng thứ ba và 30% có được Đá Mặt Trăng thứ tư.
